analysis: The project currently lacks a cohesive theme for black holes and animated objects. The existing files need updates to incorporate a cosmic theme with animations and interactive elements related to black holes. The CSS and JavaScript files require enhancements to support animated slides and pages, ensuring a visually engaging experience.

improvements.description: Update the CSS file to include a cosmic theme with dark backgrounds, swirling animations, and glowing elements to represent black holes.
Enhance the JavaScript file to implement animated slides and pages, ensuring smooth transitions and interactive elements related to black holes.
Complete the HTML content to include sections for interactive black hole visuals, animated slides, and a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon.
